name: code-doc-sync
description: Always-on doc hygiene for AI coding agents: scan for adjacent architecture docs before closing any behavior-changing task, and show concrete runtime types in flow diagrams rather than abstract declaration sites.

origin.note: Distilled from Rogers/Fido carrier integration work where two bug fixes were merged without updating flow trees or architecture docs, and where a flow tree showed an abstract declaration site instead of the concrete runtime type. See CarrierIntegrationServer commits 613daf50 and 2a7152ea.
